howItWorks.intro: This room paint calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Gallons
rules.explanation: Paintable area times coats divided by per-gallon coverage.

howItWorks.outro: Material prices and building codes vary by region. Get local quotes before purchasing.

faq.q: How much does a gallon of paint cover?
faq.a: About 350-400 sq ft per gallon for one coat.
Usually yes, especially when changing colors. One coat may suffice for touch-ups.
